evidence_quotes.quote: games that already were sold to eu-citizens that are on the risk of being destroyed / turnt unplayable.
There are games that I really love that don't have an end of life plan and I would be super disappointed to not being able to play them anymore in the future.
I already lost several games this way because companies stop supporting them and decide to turn the servers offline.
I would just be happy about a game just getting an offline palyable version even if it means not being able to beat some multiplayer aspects.

paragraphs.text: Hey! :D I would love for this act to also include games that already were sold to eu-citizens that are on the risk of being destroyed / turnt unplayable. There are games that I really love that don't have an end of life plan and I would be super disappointed to not being able to play them anymore in the future. I already lost several games this way because companies stop supporting them and decide to turn the servers offline. I would just be happy about a game just getting an offline palyable version even if it means not being able to beat some multiplayer aspects.
